---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for DevAgent
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "The agent can't handle multi-file refactoring because..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Example Usage
```bash
python main.py --task "Refactor auth module" --root ./backend --strategy multi-file
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Ideas
If you have thoughts on how to implement this:
- [ ] New tool needed?
- [ ] Changes to agent loop?
- [ ] New prompting strategy?
- [ ] Additional dependencies?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references.
